result.summary: Elastic exposes Elasticsearch and Kibana HTTP APIs plus an Elastic Agent Builder MCP server; all require an Elastic API key, sent as `Authorization: ApiKey <key>`.

es_api_key.label: Elasticsearch API key
es_api_key.setup: Go to the [Elasticsearch API keys](https://www.elastic.co/docs/deploy-manage/api-keys/elasticsearch-api-keys) docs and create a key for your deployment or project. Use the narrowest roles possible; Elastic recommends API keys for authenticating to Elasticsearch and Kibana APIs in stack deployments. Copy the resulting key value; it is sent as `Authorization: ApiKey <key>` on supported surfaces.
